items.a: Nice dresses,  a well-cut suit, owambe dresses & gele, agbada & fila. The house colours are shades of pink, wine, white and gold, so lean that way if you can. The day is indoors, styled as a garden, so dress for a lush celebration.
We have chosen an adults only celebration, with the warm exception of those named on your invitation. We hope this gives every guest a restful day in the hall.
The day begins at 10 in the morning. Please aim to be seated in the hall by a quarter to ten so we can start on time.
The whole day takes place indoors, in a hall dressed as a garden, at Redemption Camp, Mowe, Ogun State. There is a map and a maps link on the Venue page.
Yes. There is ample parking within Redemption Camp, with stewards on hand to guide you to the hall.

items.q: Can I take photographs during the ceremony?
items.a: Yes, you can take pictures with your phone. A drive link will be shared for you to upload.
Please see our Blessings page, where small contributions go toward our first home.

items.q: How do I get in touch?
